chapters.title: The Hotel Key
chapters.content: When Julia checked into the old hotel, the receptionist hesitated before handing her the key to room 204. Something about his expression made her curious.

chapters.title: Strange Noises
chapters.content: That night, she heard soft footsteps in the hallway and a quiet knock on her door. But when she opened it, nobody was there.

chapters.title: The Hidden Diary
chapters.content: Inside the bedside table, Julia found an old diary left by a previous guest. Its final page ended with a warning about room 204.
